name: Bobby Windham
bio: Bobby Windham serves as the Mayor of Newton, the county seat of Newton County. Newton is a small, tight-knit community in deep East Texas near the Texas-Louisiana border and Toledo Bend Reservoir. The mayor presides over city council meetings and advocates for community services and local improvements.
campaignPromises: Promote Toledo Bend Reservoir tourism and recreation
Improve city roads and water infrastructure
Support local businesses and economic opportunity
Maintain city services and public safety
